epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis with severity scoring in specialist care (e.g., EASI/SCORAD)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to dermatology and advanced therapies when needed

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Strong referral pathways to dermatology in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Emollients, topical anti-inflammatories, phototherapy/systemic agents/biologics for severe cases
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Wide access to evidence-based pediatric dermatology care in many member states
